{{Quote|They've gone mad, they're destroying droids all over the city!|The 3D-4 administrative droid to [[Dorsk 82]]|<ref name="The New Jedi Order: Edge of Victory I: Conquest">''[[The New Jedi Order: Edge of Victory I: Conquest]]''</ref>}}
A '''3D-4 administrative droid''' was a [[3D-4 administrative droid]] from the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Ando/Legends|Ando]].

==Biography==
During the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]], the [[Aqualish/Legends|Aqualish]] began destroying [[Droid/Legends|droids]] ''en masse'' to [[Invasion of Ando (Yuuzhan Vong War)|appease]] the [[Yuuzhan Vong]]. In [[26 ABY/Legends|26 ABY]], [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Dorsk 82]] tried to save a number of these droids. The 3D-4 administrative droid was in a group of 38 that he was protecting from a mob in the city of [[Imthitill]]. However, all the droids were destroyed when Dorsk's rescue ship was destroyed, along with its pilot [[Hhen]]. Dorsk 82 was later killed by the mob.

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Edge of Victory I: Conquest]]''
